elements.original_description: A person standing with a neutral expression, arms slightly outstretched, on a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A high-quality photograph of a person standing with a neutral expression, arms slightly outstretched, isolated on a pure white background. Cinematic, lifestyle-themed studio lighting with soft bokeh, high resolution, and sharp focus. Professional photography. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D minimalist icon of a cartoonish green vine creeping upward from the bottom left corner, with small dollar signs embedded in its leaves.
